subtask: Summarize 10 Tableau dashboards into 6 stakeholder-ready insights for a Monthly Business Review using GPT

items.title: awesome-chatgpt-prompts
items.reflection: yes, the content titled "awesome-chatgpt-prompts" could potentially be helpful as it is a prompt engineering guide. given the user's need to improve in prompt engineering and their goal to use gpt-4 for summarizing tableau dashboards, this guide could provide valuable insights and techniques to craft effective prompts for this task.
items.why: "Check out the 'awesome-chatgpt-prompts' on GitHub. This guide will help you enhance your prompt engineering skills, which are essential in this use case. You'll learn how to effectively design and refine prompts for AI, which can be used to generate insight-ready slides for your Monthly Business Review. This guide will also introduce you to the concept of automation workflows, a skill that can help streamline the process of generating these slides. By leveraging AI and automation, you can save time and focus
